summary.key_theme: 公司在 AI 資料中心電力需求驅動下具備長期成長潛力，但近期股價經歷顯著回調，市場正評估其估值合理性與監管不確定性。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy’s Crane Loan Highlights Nuclear Role In AI Power Demand
bullish.reason: 美國能源部批准 10 億美元貸款用於重啟 Crane 核電廠，直接強化公司在 AI 電力供應鏈的核心地位。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy : Ranked First on Barron's 2026 List of the Most Sustainable U.S. Companies
bullish.reason: 獲巴倫週刊評選為美國最永續企業第一名，提升 ESG 投資吸引力與品牌價值。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy : The California State Water Project Moves Closer to Carbon Neutrality with 105 MW Pastoria Solar Project Coming Online
bullish.reason: 旗下 Calpine 完成 105 MW 太陽能專案，展現公司在多元能源轉型與碳中和目標的執行力。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Asserts Dominance on Clean Energy with Calvert Cliffs Clean Energy Upgrades
bullish.reason: 透過 Calvert Cliffs 核電廠升級，持續鞏固其在清潔能源發電領域的市場主導地位。

bullish.title: Wall Street Bullish on Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG), Here’s What You Need to Know
bullish.reason: 華爾街與投資社群普遍看好其作為成長型公用事業股的長期潛力。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer on Constellation Energy (CEG): “I Think Represents Decent Value at These Levels”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開表示該股在當前價位具備投資價值，有助於提振散戶信心。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG): Traditional Utility Versus Tech Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 將公司定位為 AI 資料中心基礎設施供應商，有助於市場重新評估其估值倍數。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy: Creating More Visibility For Investors
bullish.reason: 透過資產剝離與收購 Calpine 調整發電組合，提升財務透明度與營運效率。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy Is Down 28% From Its 52-Week High. Here's What Is Weighing on the Stock.
bearish.reason: 股價自高點回調 28 %，反映市場對其過高估值的修正壓力，此篇涵蓋了多數利空因素。

bearish.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Constellation Energy, Lowers Price Target to $360
bearish.reason: 摩根士丹利分析師 David Arcaro 下調目標價，顯示機構對短期股價動能轉趨保守。

bearish.title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Is Falling Today
bearish.reason: 在缺乏明確利空消息下股價持續下跌，顯示市場賣壓沉重且投資人情緒脆弱。

bearish.title: Is Constellation Energy (CEG) Quietly Becoming the Go-To Power Partner for AI Data Centers?
bearish.reason: 提及監管不確定性、核電重啟延遲及政治壓力，這些因素是壓抑股價的潛在風險。

bearish.title: Is Constellation Energy (CEG) Still Attractive After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
bearish.reason: 探討在經歷多年強勁漲幅後，當前股價是否已透支未來成長空間。

neutral.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
neutral.reason: 僅為單日股價表現回顧，對長期趨勢影響有限。

neutral.title: Nuclear Focused Constellation Energy's 25% Price Drop Changes the Buy Equation, But Not Enough
neutral.reason: 綜合分析股價下跌後的買入邏輯，結論為估值仍偏高，觀點中立。

neutral.title: Why Constellation Energy Stock Is Falling Today
neutral.reason: 與 Yahoo 同名報導內容重複，僅作為市場波動的觀察紀錄。
